introduction.en: Follow four cues from the initial simplex to the terminal decision.
introduction.ja: 4つのcueで、初期simplexから終了判断までを順に追います。

annotation.en: First locate the three vertices and identify best and worst.
annotation.ja: 3頂点の位置とbest / worstの役割を先に確認します。

annotation.en: Move the worst point across the centroid and inspect the decision.
annotation.ja: worstを重心の反対側へ動かし、候補を受理する根拠を見ます。

annotation.en: Connect an accepted operation to the updated simplex and best value.
annotation.ja: 受理された操作でsimplexと最良値がどう更新されるかを結び付けます。

annotation.en: Inspect the final simplex and stop reason without generalizing performance.
annotation.ja: 最終simplexの大きさと終了理由を確認し、一般的性能の証明ではないと切り分けます。

summary.en: Nelder–Mead advances through simplex proposals and decisions, not gradients.
summary.ja: Nelder–Meadは勾配ではなく、simplexの候補生成と受理判断で探索を進めます。

derived_media_caption.en: Nelder–Mead: simplex geometry and acceptance decisions
derived_media_caption.ja: Nelder–Mead: simplexの幾何操作と受理判断

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: The simplex moves by reflection, expansion, contraction, and shrinkage
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 反射・拡大・収縮・縮小で単体が移動する

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the problem instance optimum as a goal cue
known_reference_display.note_ja: 問題instanceの既知最適点をgoal cueとして表示する

learning_objective.en: Connect simplex geometry with candidate acceptance decisions
learning_objective.ja: 単体の幾何操作と候補の受理判断を結び付けて読む

lesson.limitations_en: A deterministic 2D educational run, not a general performance ranking
lesson.limitations_ja: 2次元の教育用決定論的実行であり、一般的な性能優劣を示さない

narration_steps.title_ja: 最初の候補と受理判断
単体の移動と縮小を追跡

static_summary.en: Show simplex vertices, candidate, accepted operation, and best-value changes on contours.
static_summary.ja: 等高線上でsimplex頂点、候補点、受理操作、最良値の変化を示す。

success_signals.label_en: An accepted operation updates the simplex and best value
success_signals.label_ja: 受理された操作で単体と最良値が更新される

text_alternative.en: Report vertex ranks, candidate, operation, decision, and best value for each frame.
text_alternative.ja: 各frameの頂点順位、候補点、操作、受理結果、最良値を順に読む。

derived_media_caption.en: Nelder–Mead: simplex geometry and acceptance decisions
derived_media_caption.ja: Nelder–Mead: simplexの幾何操作と受理判断

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: The simplex moves by reflection, expansion, contraction, and shrinkage
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 反射・拡大・収縮・縮小で単体が移動する

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the problem instance optimum as a goal cue
known_reference_display.note_ja: 問題instanceの既知最適点をgoal cueとして表示する

learning_objective.en: Connect simplex geometry with candidate acceptance decisions
learning_objective.ja: 単体の幾何操作と候補の受理判断を結び付けて読む

lesson.limitations_en: A deterministic 2D educational run, not a general performance ranking
lesson.limitations_ja: 2次元の教育用決定論的実行であり、一般的な性能優劣を示さない

learning_objective.ja: 単体の幾何操作と候補の受理判断を結び付けて読む

lesson.limitations_en: A deterministic 2D educational run, not a general performance ranking
lesson.limitations_ja: 2次元の教育用決定論的実行であり、一般的な性能優劣を示さない

narration_steps.title_ja: 最初の候補と受理判断
単体の移動と縮小を追跡

static_summary.en: Show simplex vertices, candidate, accepted operation, and best-value changes on contours.
static_summary.ja: 等高線上でsimplex頂点、候補点、受理操作、最良値の変化を示す。

success_signals.label_en: An accepted operation updates the simplex and best value
success_signals.label_ja: 受理された操作で単体と最良値が更新される

text_alternative.en: Report vertex ranks, candidate, operation, decision, and best value for each frame.
text_alternative.ja: 各frameの頂点順位、候補点、操作、受理結果、最良値を順に読む。

introduction.en: Connect the gradient, update vector, and next point in each frame.
introduction.ja: 勾配、更新vector、次の点を同じframeで結び付けます。

annotation.en: Inspect the gradient direction at the initial point.
annotation.ja: 初期点で勾配がどちらを指すかを確認します。

annotation.en: The update along the negative gradient creates the next point.
annotation.ja: 負の勾配方向のupdateが次の現在点を作ります。

annotation.en: Read cross-valley oscillation together with objective decrease.
annotation.ja: 細長い谷を横切る振動と目的値の減少を同時に読みます。

annotation.en: Inspect best-so-far and stopping under this fixed preset.
annotation.ja: best-so-farと終了条件を、この固定presetの結果として確認します。

summary.en: Gradient descent converts gradients into updates that move toward lower objective values.
summary.ja: 勾配降下法ではgradientからupdateを作り、目的値を下げる方向へ点を移します。

derived_media_caption.en: Gradient Descent: update trajectory in an elongated valley
derived_media_caption.ja: Gradient Descent: 細長い谷での更新軌跡

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Learning rate and update rules change oscillation and divergence in the valley
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 学習率と更新則により谷での振動・発散の仕方が変わる

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the known optimum in the trajectory coordinate system
known_reference_display.note_ja: 既知最適点を軌跡と同じ座標系に表示する

learning_objective.en: Read gradient, update vector, trajectory, and objective at the same evaluation
learning_objective.ja: 勾配、更新vector、軌跡、目的値を同じevaluationで読む

lesson.limitations_en: An educational fixed-preset comparison, not a general method ranking
lesson.limitations_ja: 同一presetの教育用比較であり、一般的な手法の優劣を示さない

narration_steps.title_ja: 谷を横切る振動または発散を読む

static_summary.en: Synchronize Gradient Descent current point, gradient, update, and objective by evaluation.
static_summary.ja: Gradient Descentの現在点、gradient、update、目的値をevaluation軸で同期する。

success_signals.label_en: Gradient and update directions are reflected in the next current point
success_signals.label_ja: gradientとupdateの向きが次の現在点へ反映される

text_alternative.en: Report current point, objective, gradient, update vector, and status at each evaluation.
text_alternative.ja: 各evaluationの現在点、目的値、gradient、update vector、終了状態を読む。

derived_media_caption.en: Momentum Sgd: update trajectory in an elongated valley
derived_media_caption.ja: Momentum Sgd: 細長い谷での更新軌跡

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Learning rate and update rules change oscillation and divergence in the valley
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 学習率と更新則により谷での振動・発散の仕方が変わる

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the known optimum in the trajectory coordinate system
known_reference_display.note_ja: 既知最適点を軌跡と同じ座標系に表示する

learning_objective.en: Read gradient, update vector, trajectory, and objective at the same evaluation
learning_objective.ja: 勾配、更新vector、軌跡、目的値を同じevaluationで読む

lesson.limitations_en: An educational fixed-preset comparison, not a general method ranking
lesson.limitations_ja: 同一presetの教育用比較であり、一般的な手法の優劣を示さない

static_summary.ja: Momentum Sgdの現在点、gradient、update、目的値をevaluation軸で同期する。

derived_media_caption.ja: Adam: 細長い谷での更新軌跡

static_summary.ja: Adamの現在点、gradient、update、目的値をevaluation軸で同期する。

failure_signals.label_en: Objective value and oscillation amplitude grow after updates
failure_signals.label_ja: 更新後に目的値と振幅が増大する

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the known optimum in the trajectory coordinate system
known_reference_display.note_ja: 既知最適点を軌跡と同じ座標系に表示する

learning_objective.ja: 勾配、更新vector、軌跡、目的値を同じevaluationで読む

lesson.limitations_en: An educational fixed-preset comparison, not a general method ranking
lesson.limitations_ja: 同一presetの教育用比較であり、一般的な手法の優劣を示さない

misconception.en: Moving against the gradient always decreases the objective regardless of step size
misconception.ja: 勾配の反対へ進めば学習率に関係なく目的値は下がり続ける

narration_steps.title_ja: 谷を横切る振動または発散を読む

static_summary.en: Synchronize Adam current point, gradient, update, and objective by evaluation.
static_summary.ja: Adamの現在点、gradient、update、目的値をevaluation軸で同期する。

success_signals.label_en: Gradient and update directions are reflected in the next current point
success_signals.label_ja: gradientとupdateの向きが次の現在点へ反映される

text_alternative.en: Report current point, objective, gradient, update vector, and status at each evaluation.
text_alternative.ja: 各evaluationの現在点、目的値、gradient、update vector、終了状態を読む。

introduction.en: Follow nodes, bounds, the incumbent, and pruning until proof completes.
introduction.ja: node、bound、incumbent、枝刈りを証明完了まで追います。

annotation.ja: root nodeの上界を確認します。

annotation.en: The first branch splits the search into two candidates.
annotation.ja: 最初のbranchで探索候補が二つに分かれます。

annotation.en: A bound removes a subtree that cannot improve the incumbent.
annotation.ja: incumbentより改善不能なsubtreeをboundで捨てます。

annotation.en: No open nodes remain; matching incumbent and bound proves optimality.
annotation.ja: open nodeがなくなり、incumbentとboundの一致で最適性を証明します。

summary.en: Branch-and-Bound avoids full enumeration by pruning with bounds and an incumbent.
summary.ja: Branch-and-Boundは全列挙せず、boundとincumbentで不要なsubtreeを除きます。

derived_media_caption.en: Branch-and-Bound tree: pruning by bounds and the incumbent
derived_media_caption.ja: Branch-and-Boundの探索木: boundとincumbentによる枝刈り

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Observe branching, bounds, incumbent updates, and two pruning reasons
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 枝分かれ、上界、incumbent更新、2種類の枝刈りを追跡する

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the known optimum and bound gap
known_reference_display.note_ja: 既知の最適値とbound gapを表示する

learning_objective.en: Read how bounds and the incumbent reduce the search space
learning_objective.ja: 上界とincumbentが探索範囲を狭める過程を読む

lesson.limitations_en: A four-variable educational Branch-and-Bound; solver cuts and presolve are omitted
lesson.limitations_ja: 4変数の教育用Branch-and-Boundであり、実solverのcut生成やpresolve性能は再現しない

narration_steps.title_en: Check whether proof completed or the budget stopped the run
narration_steps.title_ja: 証明完了か予算停止かを確認

static_summary.en: Follow nodes, bounds, the incumbent, and pruning reasons together.
static_summary.ja: 探索木でnode、bound、incumbent、枝刈り理由を同時に追う。

success_signals.label_en: A subtree is pruned by its bound or infeasibility
success_signals.label_ja: 上界または実行不可能性でsubtreeが枝刈りされる

text_alternative.en: At each milestone, report explored nodes, global bound, incumbent, and stop reason.
text_alternative.ja: 各milestoneで展開済みnode、global bound、incumbent、停止理由を読み上げる。

derived_media_caption.en: Branch-and-Bound tree: pruning by bounds and the incumbent
derived_media_caption.ja: Branch-and-Boundの探索木: boundとincumbentによる枝刈り

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Observe branching, bounds, incumbent updates, and two pruning reasons
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 枝分かれ、上界、incumbent更新、2種類の枝刈りを追跡する

failure_signals.label_en: Unexplored nodes and a bound gap remain at the node budget
failure_signals.label_ja: node予算到達時に未探索nodeとbound gapが残る

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the known optimum and bound gap
known_reference_display.note_ja: 既知の最適値とbound gapを表示する

learning_objective.en: Read how bounds and the incumbent reduce the search space
learning_objective.ja: 上界とincumbentが探索範囲を狭める過程を読む

lesson.limitations_en: A four-variable educational Branch-and-Bound; solver cuts and presolve are omitted
lesson.limitations_ja: 4変数の教育用Branch-and-Boundであり、実solverのcut生成やpresolve性能は再現しない

misconception.en: An incumbent from a budget-stopped tree is proven optimal
misconception.ja: 予算で止まった探索木のincumbentは最適性が証明されている

narration_steps.title_en: Check whether proof completed or the budget stopped the run
narration_steps.title_ja: 証明完了か予算停止かを確認

static_summary.en: Follow nodes, bounds, the incumbent, and pruning reasons together.
static_summary.ja: 探索木でnode、bound、incumbent、枝刈り理由を同時に追う。

success_signals.label_en: A subtree is pruned by its bound or infeasibility
success_signals.label_ja: 上界または実行不可能性でsubtreeが枝刈りされる

text_alternative.en: At each milestone, report explored nodes, global bound, incumbent, and stop reason.
text_alternative.ja: 各milestoneで展開済みnode、global bound、incumbent、停止理由を読み上げる。

derived_media_caption.en: Bayesian Optimization: surrogate updates for exploit / noiseless
derived_media_caption.ja: Bayesian Optimization: exploit / noiselessでのsurrogate更新

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Exploration weight or observation noise changes the selected point and uncertainty
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 探索係数または観測noiseの違いで次点と不確実性表示が変わる

failure_signals.label_en: Candidate or uncertainty differs from the baseline
failure_signals.label_ja: baselineと異なる候補点または不確実性になる

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the optimizer-hidden true objective only as an educational overlay
known_reference_display.note_ja: optimizerが参照しない真の目的関数は教材用overlayとしてのみ表示する

learning_objective.en: Read how observations update the surrogate and acquisition to select the next point
learning_objective.ja: 観測からsurrogateとacquisitionを更新して次の評価点を選ぶ流れを読む

lesson.limitations_en: A fixed-seed one-dimensional educational run with an RBF kernel; kernel and noise assumptions, higher dimensions, and finite budgets change behavior and do not prove global optimality
lesson.limitations_ja: 固定seed・1次元・RBF kernelの教育用run。kernel/noise仮定、高次元化、有限予算では挙動が変わり、大域最適性を証明しない

misconception.en: Changing exploration weight or observation noise leaves the next point and uncertainty unchanged
misconception.ja: 探索係数や観測noiseを変えても次の評価点と不確実性は同じになる

narration_steps.title_en: First surrogate update and candidate selection
narration_steps.title_ja: 最初のsurrogate更新と次点選択

narration_steps.title_en: Uncertainty changes as observations are added
narration_steps.title_ja: 観測追加で不確実性が変わる

narration_steps.title_en: Inspect the incumbent at the evaluation budget
narration_steps.title_ja: 評価予算到達時のincumbentを確認

static_summary.en: Show observations, surrogate mean, uncertainty, Expected Improvement, and next candidate in one frame.
static_summary.ja: 観測、surrogate平均、不確実性、Expected Improvement、次候補を同じframeで示す。

success_signals.label_en: The next evaluation is selected from an acquisition peak
success_signals.label_ja: acquisitionの山から次の評価点が選ばれる

text_alternative.en: At each evaluation, report observations, incumbent, next candidate, acquisition, and uncertainty.
text_alternative.ja: 各評価で観測点、incumbent、次候補、acquisition、不確実性を読み上げる。

derived_media_caption.en: Bayesian Optimization: surrogate updates for exploit / small_noise
derived_media_caption.ja: Bayesian Optimization: exploit / small_noiseでのsurrogate更新

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Exploration weight or observation noise changes the selected point and uncertainty
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 探索係数または観測noiseの違いで次点と不確実性表示が変わる

failure_signals.label_en: Candidate or uncertainty differs from the baseline
failure_signals.label_ja: baselineと異なる候補点または不確実性になる

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the optimizer-hidden true objective only as an educational overlay
known_reference_display.note_ja: optimizerが参照しない真の目的関数は教材用overlayとしてのみ表示する

learning_objective.en: Read how observations update the surrogate and acquisition to select the next point
learning_objective.ja: 観測からsurrogateとacquisitionを更新して次の評価点を選ぶ流れを読む

lesson.limitations_en: A fixed-seed one-dimensional educational run with an RBF kernel; kernel and noise assumptions, higher dimensions, and finite budgets change behavior and do not prove global optimality
lesson.limitations_ja: 固定seed・1次元・RBF kernelの教育用run。kernel/noise仮定、高次元化、有限予算では挙動が変わり、大域最適性を証明しない

misconception.ja: 探索係数や観測noiseを変えても次の評価点と不確実性は同じになる

narration_steps.title_en: First surrogate update and candidate selection
narration_steps.title_ja: 最初のsurrogate更新と次点選択

narration_steps.title_en: Uncertainty changes as observations are added
narration_steps.title_ja: 観測追加で不確実性が変わる

narration_steps.title_en: Inspect the incumbent at the evaluation budget
narration_steps.title_ja: 評価予算到達時のincumbentを確認

static_summary.en: Show observations, surrogate mean, uncertainty, Expected Improvement, and next candidate in one frame.
static_summary.ja: 観測、surrogate平均、不確実性、Expected Improvement、次候補を同じframeで示す。

success_signals.label_en: The next evaluation is selected from an acquisition peak
success_signals.label_ja: acquisitionの山から次の評価点が選ばれる

text_alternative.en: At each evaluation, report observations, incumbent, next candidate, acquisition, and uncertainty.
text_alternative.ja: 各評価で観測点、incumbent、次候補、acquisition、不確実性を読み上げる。

introduction.en: Follow four cues from initial observations to the evaluation budget.
introduction.ja: 初期観測から次点選択、予算到達までを4つのcueで追います。

annotation.en: Start with observed points and uncertainty between them.
annotation.ja: 最初に観測済みの点と、その間に残る不確実性を見ます。

annotation.en: The next evaluation is selected from an Expected Improvement peak.
annotation.ja: Expected Improvementの山から次の評価点が選ばれます。

annotation.en: Uncertainty contracts near the newly added observation.
annotation.ja: 観測を追加した近傍で不確実性が縮むことを確認します。

annotation.en: Inspect the incumbent under the fixed budget without claiming general superiority.
annotation.ja: 固定評価予算で得たincumbentを確認し、一般的優越性とは分けます。

summary.en: BO updates a surrogate from observations and uses acquisition to choose the next expensive evaluation.
summary.ja: BOは観測でsurrogateを更新し、acquisitionで次の高価な評価を選びます。

derived_media_caption.en: Bayesian Optimization: surrogate updates for explore / noiseless
derived_media_caption.ja: Bayesian Optimization: explore / noiselessでのsurrogate更新

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Update the surrogate and Expected Improvement from observations to choose the next evaluation
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 観測からsurrogateとExpected Improvementを更新し、次の評価点を選ぶ

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the optimizer-hidden true objective only as an educational overlay
known_reference_display.note_ja: optimizerが参照しない真の目的関数は教材用overlayとしてのみ表示する

learning_objective.en: Read how observations update the surrogate and acquisition to select the next point
learning_objective.ja: 観測からsurrogateとacquisitionを更新して次の評価点を選ぶ流れを読む

narration_steps.title_en: First surrogate update and candidate selection
narration_steps.title_ja: 最初のsurrogate更新と次点選択

narration_steps.title_en: Uncertainty changes as observations are added
narration_steps.title_ja: 観測追加で不確実性が変わる

narration_steps.title_en: Inspect the incumbent at the evaluation budget
narration_steps.title_ja: 評価予算到達時のincumbentを確認

static_summary.en: Show observations, surrogate mean, uncertainty, Expected Improvement, and next candidate in one frame.
static_summary.ja: 観測、surrogate平均、不確実性、Expected Improvement、次候補を同じframeで示す。

success_signals.label_en: The next evaluation is selected from an acquisition peak
success_signals.label_ja: acquisitionの山から次の評価点が選ばれる

text_alternative.en: At each evaluation, report observations, incumbent, next candidate, acquisition, and uncertainty.
text_alternative.ja: 各評価で観測点、incumbent、次候補、acquisition、不確実性を読み上げる。

derived_media_caption.en: Constraint-aware path and failure contrast on a feasible region
derived_media_caption.ja: feasible region上の制約対応経路とfailure contrast

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: The constraint-aware path stops on the active boundary while the unconstrained path becomes infeasible.
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 制約対応経路はactive boundaryで止まり、制約無視経路は低い目的値でもinfeasibleになります。

failure_signals.label_en: lower objective with a constraint violation
failure_signals.label_ja: 目的値は低いがconstraint violationあり

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the analytic optimum and active constraint.
known_reference_display.note_ja: 解析的な既知最適点とactive constraintを表示します。

learning_objective.en: Read objective value and feasibility separately
learning_objective.ja: 目的値と実行可能性を別々に読む

lesson.limitations_en: A deterministic teaching trace on the canonical problem, not a reproduction of SLSQP internals.
lesson.limitations_ja: SLSQPそのものの内部反復を再現せず、canonical problemを使った決定的な教育用Traceです。

misconception.en: A lower objective makes an infeasible point a good solution
misconception.ja: 目的値が低ければ制約違反点でも良い解である

narration_steps.title_ja: 境界に沿って目的を改善

static_summary.en: Compare two paths over a disk-shaped feasible region.
static_summary.ja: 円内のfeasible regionと2本の経路を比較します。

text_alternative.en: The constraint-aware path reaches the boundary reference; the unconstrained path leaves the disk.
text_alternative.ja: 制約対応経路は円境界の既知最適点へ、制約無視経路は円外の原点へ進みます。

scenarios.title_en: Compare a feasible path with an unconstrained failure
scenarios.title_ja: 実行可能領域と制約を無視した失敗を比べる

derived_media_caption.en: Bi-objective results and the known Pareto front
derived_media_caption.ja: 2目的の実行結果と既知Pareto front

lesson.expected_phenomenon_en: Non-dominated points form a trade-off curve and preference moves the selected point.
lesson.expected_phenomenon_ja: 非劣点はtrade-off曲線を作り、weightを変えると選択点がfront上を移動します。

known_reference_display.note_en: Show the analytic front and ideal / nadir references.
known_reference_display.note_ja: 解析的frontとideal / nadirを表示します。

learning_objective.ja: 支配関係とpreferenceを分けて意思決定する

lesson.limitations_en: A convex analytic lesson; the weighted-sum warning describes the general non-convex limitation.
lesson.limitations_ja: 凸で解析的な教材です。weighted sumが非凸frontを欠落させる注意は一般化上の限界として示します。

misconception.en: A multi-objective problem has one point best for every objective
misconception.ja: 多目的問題にも全目的で一意なbestがある

narration_steps.title_ja: 実行結果を目的空間へ配置

static_summary.en: Plot dominated results, the non-dominated front, and preference selection.
static_summary.ja: 支配点、非劣front、preference選択を同じ目的空間に表示します。

success_signals.label_en: distinguishes the front from the selected point
success_signals.label_ja: 非劣frontと選択点を区別できる

text_alternative.en: For two minimized objectives, multiple trade-off candidates lie on the green front.
text_alternative.ja: 左下方向へ改善する2目的で、緑のfront上に複数のtrade-off候補があります。

scenarios.title_en: Read a Pareto front instead of one best value
scenarios.title_ja: 単一bestではなくPareto frontを読む
